mapper.select: SELECT id, session_scope, role, content, name, created_at FROM messages WHERE session_scope = #{sessionScope} ORDER BY created_at ASC
SELECT id, session_scope, role, content, name, created_at FROM messages ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO messages (id, session_scope, role, content, name, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{sessionScope}, #{role}, #{content}, #{name}, #{createdAt})

INSERT INTO messages (id, session_scope, role, content, name, created_at) VALUES
(#{item.id}, #{item.sessionScope}, #{item.role}, #{item.content}, #{item.name}, #{item.createdAt})
